hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" | grep -qE '(\.env$|\.env\.|selene\.db)'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Cannot edit .env files or production database' >&2; exit 2; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" | grep -q '\.ts$'; then cd /Users/chaseeasterling/selene && npx tsc --noEmit --pretty 2>&1 | head -20; fi

if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" | grep -qE '(src/workflows/[^/]+\.ts$|launchd/.*\.plist$|scripts/install-(launchd|prod)\.sh|scripts/deploy-prod\.sh)'; then echo '{"systemMessage": "LAUNCHD-SYNC: Workflow or plist file changed — invoke the launchd-auditor subagent to verify sync between src/workflows/, launchd/, and scripts/install-launchd.sh."}'; fi
